message:
The other day, I found myself in a bit of a pickle. My kids were all set for a weekend camping trip, and I was feeling a bit frazzled with last-minute packing. Just as I was about to run out the door, I remembered that I had put together a small go-bag for emergencies a while back. I quickly checked it, and there it was: a flashlight, some snacks, and even a mini first-aid kit! It felt like a small win that saved the day because I was able to add the bag to our camping gear, ensuring we were ready for anything, even if it was just a minor scrape or a late-night walk to the bathroom! Have you ever had a little preparedness moment that turned into a big relief? 

(P.S. This little refresher helped me feel even more ready!)
